title: Challenging microscopic structure and reaction models for nucleon scattering off nuclei in the A=208 mass region

x4freetext: Challenging microscopic structure and reaction models

flag.hlp: Reference to related data compiled in another entry

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Nuclear Science and Engineering, Vol.81, p.491 (1982)

x4freetext: 7 MV EN tandem Van de Graaff
4.5 to 12.6 MeV and 3.0 to 5.5 uA deuteron beams
Neutron production was monitored by detection of
. neutrons by an auxiliary TOF detector (recoil proton
detector) at 55 deg and 8.00 m from the deuteron gas
flight path of 8.00+/-0.02 m, repetition rate of
2.5 MHz and pulse width of 1.0 ns.
Scattered-neutron overall energy resolution of 240 keV
(FWHM) at Einc=7.5 MeV and increasing almost linearly
with energy up to 380 keV (FWHM) at Einc=15.5 MeV.
. anisotropy of neutron flux on the sample
. angular resolution due to finite geometry of neutron
